title: TpvRecaptureConfig
description: Extension 4 TPV recapture configuration object. Governing law: ext4-spec-v0.1.4 §7.1, §5.3, §12.1, §13.1–§13.3.

tpv_model_id.description: Stable identifier for this TPV model entry. §5.3.

coverage_fraction.description: Fraction of radiator surface covered by TPV cells. [0, 1]. §9.3, §12.1.

spectral_capture_fraction.description: Fraction of incident spectrum usable by TPV cells. [0, 1]. §9.3, §12.1.

coupling_derate_fraction.description: Coupling derate factor for practical losses. [0, 1]. §9.3, §12.1.

conversion_efficiency_mode.description: Efficiency computation mode. 'fixed' requires eta_tpv_fixed. 'carnot_bounded' requires eta_tpv_carnot_fraction and tpv_cold_side_temperature_k. §9.5–§9.6, §7.1.

eta_tpv_fixed.description: Fixed TPV conversion efficiency. Required when conversion_efficiency_mode='fixed'. [0, 1]. §9.5, §12.1.

eta_tpv_carnot_fraction.description: Fraction of Carnot efficiency used as TPV efficiency ceiling. Required when conversion_efficiency_mode='carnot_bounded'. [0, 1]. §9.6, §12.1.

tpv_cold_side_temperature_k.description: TPV cell cold-side temperature in Kelvin. Required when conversion_efficiency_mode='carnot_bounded'. Must be > 0. §9.6, §12.1.

export_fraction.description: Fraction of P_elec exported beyond the modeled thermal boundary. [0, 1]. §9.8, §12.1.

onboard_return_heat_fraction.description: Fraction of onboard-used electrical power returned as heat. α_ret. [0, 1]. §9.10, §12.1.

cell_cooling_mode.description: TPV local loss heat booking mode. 'separate_cooling': Q_tpv_loss booked as separate load. 'returns_to_radiator': Q_tpv_loss added back to radiator burden. §9.11.

iteration_report_detail.description: Detail level for iteration_history in result. 'minimal': history absent. 'full': history present with all entries. §11.3, §16.4–§16.5.
